title: Organization Guard
rule: Every business controller must use the canonical triple-guard (JwtAuthGuard, OrganizationGuard, Roles/PermissionsGuard) and explicit RBAC (@Roles or RequirePermissions).
exceptions: organizations.controller.ts (SUPER_ADMIN-only; manages Organization entities themselves, not org-scoped business data — OrganizationGuard doesn't apply regardless of D022)
